scripts.setup: npm install && if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend && npm install; else echo 'frontend not scaffolded yet'; fi
scripts.dev: if [ -d backend ] && [ -d frontend ]; then concurrently --kill-others -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "cd backend && uv run python run.py" "cd frontend && npm run dev"; else echo 'backend/frontend not scaffolded yet'; exit 1; fi
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:backend: if [ -d backend ]; then cd backend && uv run pytest; else echo 'backend not scaffolded yet'; fi
scripts.test:frontend: if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend && npm test; else echo 'frontend not scaffolded yet'; fi
scripts.build: if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend && npm run build; else echo 'frontend not scaffolded yet'; fi
